function.name: add_predicate
function.description: Add a belief predicate to an NPC's world model. Call this when a game event, quest trigger, or observation updates what an NPC believes about a subject.

npc_id.description: Identifier for the NPC whose belief is being updated (e.g. 'guard-1', 'blacksmith')

subject.description: The entity the NPC has a belief about (e.g. 'king', 'bridge-3', 'player')

timestamp.description: Unix timestamp when this belief was acquired

function.name: check_beliefs
function.description: Detect contradictions in an NPC's current belief state. Returns all pairs of conflicting predicates (same subject+attribute, different values). Call this before generating NPC dialogue or making story decisions.

npc_id.description: Identifier for the NPC to check for contradictions

function.name: repair_contradictions
function.description: Generate repair frames for all contradictions in an NPC's belief state. Uses strategies prefer_newer, prefer_higher_confidence, and prefer_observation to resolve conflicts. Call this after check_beliefs finds contradictions.

npc_id.description: Identifier for the NPC whose belief contradictions should be repaired
